title: Auto Fishing Deluxe
body:
# **Features:**


```
> Auto-fishing

> Break Protection

> Fishing Rod Swap (On low durability)

> GUI / Inventory Failsafe

> In-Game Push Notifications

> Inventory Preview

> Item-Swap Failsafe

> Mouse un-grabber (Enables Alt + TAB away from the game without loosing focus)

> MouseMovement

> Random Delay, reel / cast (User choice)

> Settings GUI

> Sound Warning for Failsafes

> ModMenu Integration

> And much more, join Discord for additional details

```

## **Dependency**
- Fabric-Api

## **Tutorial**

Default Keybinds:

Auto-Fishing: K

Settings: O

First throw the hook, then start the AutoFishing.

> _More info can be found on the Discord!_

[![Discord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=discord.com/api/guilds/1399776902541213717/widget.png%3Fstyle%3Dbanner2&n=-1)](https://discord.gg/6HA4vSDz6q)
